calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

David J. Foran, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Donald Lue and Susan Lue.
David Lue, property manager for plaintiffs, was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defendant Anthony Howard Scott.
Dismissals as to defendants Anthony Vota and Angelina Serafino were filed today, April 7, 2008.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial filed March 19, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Residential Lease-Rental Agreement
and Deposit Receipt dated 12/09/06---------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated 09/30/07----------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Donald Lue and Susan Lue, and against defendant ANTHONY HOWARD SCOTT as follows:

Plaintiffs Donald Lue and Susan Lue are is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 617 Post Street, #4, San Francisco, CA 94109. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Sacramento for Plaintiff Susan Lue & Donald Lue, who is present.
Defendant Anthony Vota and Angelina Serafino arepresent. Howard Thomas representing deft Vota and deft Serafino. Defendant Atnhony Scott is not present.

Settlement Conference Held. Pltf and defendants Anthony Vota and Angelina Serafino entered into a signed agreement. The trial date of April 7, 2008 remains on calendar. The remaining defendant is Anthony Scott.

JPT Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Maria Olopernas-Pena, Not Reported (218/206)
